a1ClaimsToRefine.explanation: n1 uses the identical verbatim refusal sentence as c1 and the identical claimType (NEGATIVE_NO_OBSERVERSHIP). It is a duplicate of c1 and should be deduped by the regate.

c3 is classified as OFFERS_VISITING_STUDENT but the quote is a capacity/closure statement about a teen volunteer program. Correct claimType is closer to NEGATIVE program-closure or capacity status, not OFFERS_VISITING_STUDENT.

c1's refusal is scoped explicitly to the teen volunteer program, not to physician/medical-student shadowing or observership. Promoting it to a USCE-lane NEGATIVE_NO_OBSERVERSHIP overstates scope; regate should downgrade to teen-volunteer-scoped only.

sc1 correctly flags multi-campus scope (Lee Memorial Hospital + Gulf Coast Medical Center) on system-domain leehealth.org. Source scope should be HEALTH_SYSTEM_LEVEL, not UNKNOWN_SCOPE — regate should re-tag accordingly.
